title: peramium pubescens
intro: Peramium pubescens, also known as the pubescent peramium, is a type of shrub that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Peramium pubescens include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, as well as its potential to act as an antimicrobial agent. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties, with some herbal preparations also using it in combination with other plants to enhance its benefits.
